name: GH_QuickImageEditor
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.GUI.GH_QuickImageEditor.)

constructors.name: GH_QuickImageEditor
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GH_QuickImageEditor class

methods.name: Dispose
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GH_QuickImageEditor and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

properties.name: CanvasImage
properties.summary: Gets or sets the canvas image.

properties.name: FrameCrop
properties.summary: Gets or sets the cropping rectangle.

properties.name: FrameFocus
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rectangle of the focus frame.

properties.name: FrameViewport
properties.summary: Gets or sets the rectangle of the viewport frame.

properties.name: ViewportImage
properties.summary: Gets or sets the viewport image.

properties.name: ViewportName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the viewport name to include. If the name string is null or empty, the active viewport is used.
